title: UFO Whistleblower Dave Grusch Speaks on Alien Bodies Being Found
summary: UFO whistleblower Dave Grusch discusses his congressional testimony regarding non-human biologics, specifically addressing questions about bodies found in connection with recovered craft. He confirms the existence of biological remains while avoiding specific details.

key_claims.claim: Non-human biological remains (bodies) have been recovered
Grusch spoke with people who worked on the biological aspect of the recovery program
Bodies were associated with recovered craft, referred to as 'pilots' in common vernacular
